title: Burning It Down Cover
lyrics: You slip your finger, tearin' my T-shirt It's done, I'm done, I'm back in my mind You keep on flyin' cause you know that it's workin' You're stuck in my head, girl, writin' the lines I couldn't sing this song without you if I tried Let's light it up like it's our last night We're just hangin' around, burnin' it down Sippin' on some cold Jack Daniels And jammin' to some old Alabama with your baby Layin' right here, naked in my bed I'm just doin' my thing, you love it when I sing Say it makes you feel like a danger We's about to get a little tangled up right about now So, girl, let's keep burnin' it down Burnin' it down, burnin' it down Girl, when you want it, know that I'm on it Know that I love, love it up on you Let's hit the switch and let our shadows dance And light it up like it's our last chance We're just hangin' around, burnin' it down Sippin' on some cold Jack Daniels And jammin' to some old Alabama with your baby Layin' right here, dreamin' in my bed I'm just doin' my thing, you love it when I sing Say it makes you feel like a danger We's about to get a little tangled up right about now So, girl, let's keep burnin' it down Burnin' it down, burnin' it down Burnin' it down, burnin' it down I wanna rock it all night, baby girl Will you rock it out with me? I wanna crawl through the dark Just to feel your heartbeat against me I wanna rock it all night, baby girl Will you rock it out with me? And I wanna crawl through the dark Just to feel your heartbeat against me We're just hangin' around, burnin' it down Sippin' on some cold Jack Daniels And jammin' to some old Alabama with your baby Layin' right here, dreamin' in my bed I'm just doin' my thing, you love it when I sing Say it makes you feel like a danger We's about to get a little tangled up right about now So, girl, let's keep burnin' it down Burnin' it down, burnin' it down We're burnin' it down, burnin' it down Burnin' it down, burnin' it down I wanna rock it all night, baby girl Will you rock it out with me? And I wanna crawl through the dark Just to feel your heartbeat against me Oh, it's the best part of it all
